statements.content: "Hopefully, we're never going to need 'em,” Trump said on Wednesday. “I don't think we will need 'em."
statements.cue: Trump’s primetime speech did not include direct criticism of NATO. But he has spent days bashing the military alliance and even threatening to withdraw, blasting its members as doing little to help with Iran and in the Strait of Hormuz.
